title: cordia borinquensis
intro: Cordia borinquensis, also known as the Puerto Rican cordia, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of cordia borinquensis include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Cordia borinquensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and effects.
